channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 21%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham hits back at Blair: ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’ – UK politics live
item.description: Burnham hits back at Blair: ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’ – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage
item.description: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage

item.title: Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: EXCL: Peter Mandelson’s associations with senior figures in China, Russia and Israel were among concerns raised by the UK’s vetting agency when it concluded he should be denied clearance, sources tell Paul Lewis, me &...
item.description: EXCL: Peter Mandelson’s associations with senior figures in China, Russia and Israel were among concerns raised by the UK’s vetting agency when it concluded he should be denied clearance, sources tell Paul Lewis, me &...

item.title: The Guardian: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?
item.description: Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?

item.title: BBC Politics: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
item.description: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair

item.title: Novara Media: Blair Tells Labour to Be More Pro-War and Less Climate Friendly

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Blair demands welfare cuts and end of ‘unsustainable’ pension triple lock
item.description: Blair demands welfare cuts and end of ‘unsustainable’ pension triple lock

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today’s newsletter: Blair obviously right about the source of Keir Starmer’s problems, problems predicted by basically everyone with an interest in policy 2022-4. Troubling for Labour that there is little serious poli...
